name: qualixar-os
description: The Universal OS for AI Agents. Forge auto-designs multi-agent teams. 13 topologies. Skill marketplace. Cost routing. Judge pipeline. Claw-compatible.
author: qualixar

tools.name: qos_task
tools.description: Task lifecycle: run, status, cancel, pause, resume, steer, list, output

tools.name: qos_agents
tools.description: Agents & Forge: list active agents, inspect, design teams, list topologies

tools.name: qos_system
tools.description: System: config get/set, model list, cost summary

tools.name: qos_context
tools.description: Context & workspace: add context, scan, list, set workspace, list files

tools.name: qos_quality
tools.description: Quality & memory: judge results, memory search, memory store

tools.name: qos_workspace
tools.description: Workspace: set directory, list files, import agent from other frameworks
